steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const headers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__table th')).map((entry) => (entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase()); return headers.includes('reach rate'); })()

(() => { const keys = ['reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder.demoReportBuilderWindow', 'reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder']; return keys.some((key) => { const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key); if (!raw) { return false; } try { const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); return parsed?.explorationSession?.dirty === true && parsed?.explorationSession?.historyIndex === 1; } catch (_) { return false; } }); })()

(() => { const headers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__table th')).map((entry) => (entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase()); return !headers.includes('reach rate'); })()

(() => { const headers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__table th')).map((entry) => (entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase()); return headers.includes('reach rate'); })()

(() => { const headers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__table th')).map((entry) => (entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase()); return !headers.includes('reach rate'); })()

(() => { const keys = ['reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder.demoReportBuilderWindow', 'reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder']; return keys.every((key) => { const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key); if (!raw) { return true; } try { const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); return !parsed?.explorationSession; } catch (_) { return false; } }); })()
